economic_notes: Investments in Nanwakolas Offset LP (26%), Nanwakolas Timber LP (21%), Nanwakolas Business Corporation (17%), Gwabalis Fisheries Society (25%), Mamalilikulla Economic Development Corporation (100%), Mamalilikulla Economic Development LP (99%). Endowment fund held at Coast Funds with balance of $1,185,165. Active in forestry, fisheries, carbon credits, and conservation (Indigenous Protected and Conserved Areas).
notes: Consolidated statements include two wholly-owned subsidiaries (Mamalilikulla Economic Development Corporation and Mamalilikulla Economic Development LP) accounted for under modified equity method, plus three partnership interests (Nanwakolas entities) also under modified equity. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. No long-term debt outstanding (fully repaid in prior year). New PS 3400 Revenue standard adopted prospectively April 1, 2023. Advances from related parties (Mamalilikulla Forestry Corporation and LP) total $2,073,915. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $987,348 + Province of BC $476,471 + First Nations Health Authority $68,598 = $1,532,417. Current liabilities not separately broken out on face of balance sheet in provided text.
